items.name_cn:
Genuine Leather
L❤ewe Mini Classic Calfskin Hammock Hobo Bag "Purple"
The Hammock Hobo deconstructs the design of a classic bag that easily changes shape, retaining the iconic hammock silhouette to create a stylish, versatile, and ergonomic hobo bag. This mini version is crafted from classic calfskin, with a knotted calfskin strap for a personalized touch.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Zipper closure
Calfskin zipper pull
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
Anagram dice
Model: 1301
Size: 28×17×9.5cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Leather
Small puzzle Tote Eucalyptus Green
25.5-14.5-31.5 New Model 1762
Glossy Calfskin Puzzle Fold
Inspired by the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbags, the Puzzle Fold handbag reinterprets them with geometrically beautiful panels that fold completely, making it a great travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight handbag paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo.
Suede lining
LOWEY gold stamping

items.name_cn:
Genuine Leather
New Celebrity Style Model 332
Medium Soft Calfskin Pebble Bucket Bag
Pebble perfectly blends pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design, creating a unique and innovative bag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and practicality, features an adjustable shoulder strap length and suits multiple carrying ways, and the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. This medium size version is made of soft calfskin.
Shoulder or crossbody carry
Adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
Interior pocket
Synthetic leather lining
Anagram engraved pebble
Size: 24.5*23.5*28cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Leather
NEW IN
Large Goya Silk Calfskin Handbag
7 Colors
Model 5608
Dimensions 22.5-16.5-6.5
The Goya is a structured bag that is very well organized for its size. The clean Anagram closure and vibrant colors contrast sharply with its sharp graphic minimalism. It is handcrafted from exquisite silk calfskin with a soft Nappa sheepskin lining. It embodies exquisite craftsmanship and is a new LOEWE product worth adding to your collection.
Shoulder carry
Adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic closure
Four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket
One exterior pocket
Calfskin lining
Metal-embossed LOEWE logo on the strap

items.name_en: Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Dimensions: 22(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Light Grey / Genuine leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick.

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather #Fendi KanU#
FEND1 launches the new fashion statement Kan U handbag, cleverly balancing functionality and modernity. The entire bag features a relief design, offering a great visual and tactile feel. A classic FF Logo buckle paired with exquisite vintage metal details. Can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, looking vintage and steady!
8BN299 Size 25x17x10
5325B89 Size 19x13x9

items.name_en: Genuine leather grain texture, soft and premium—those who touch it will understand. BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Men's Intrecciato Camera Bag features grain leather paired with classic weaving, elevating the texture and durability. The matte finish is perfect for autumn and winter outfits. In terms of capacity, this bag is no less impressive than others, with an interior compartment for easy storage of essentials.

Top-tier this I was sold by the packaging,
Saw the packaging moment I decided must do!
But I still shallow,
Packaging good count what, bag self is explosive!
Very easy on eyes, originally Horsebit item won't ugly where go!
This year many clothes brands also incorporated Horsebit elements.
Self-kept, cabbage price, close eyes enter!
